samples.text: If the dough is baked, then it becomes bread. The dough is baked. Does it follow that it becomes bread?
Whenever the dough is baked, it becomes bread as a result. In this case the dough is baked. Can we conclude that it becomes bread?
If the dough is put in the oven, then it turns into bread. The dough is put in the oven. Does it follow that it turns into bread?
The condition for 'it becomes bread' is met because the dough is baked. Does it follow that it becomes bread?
If the dough is baked, then it becomes bread. The dough is baked. Someone left the door open earlier. Does it follow that it becomes bread?
